title: Colclazure
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Galactic Empire |image=[[File:Colclazure.jpg]] |name=Colclazure |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Black]] |feathers= |eyes= |skin=Light |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Do you know the difference between an error and a mistake, Ensign?''"
"''No sir.''"
"''Any one can make an error, Ensign. But that error doesn't become a mistake until you refuse to correct it.|Thrawn and Ensign Colclazure|''[[Heir to the Empire]]''}} '''Colclazure''' was an [[Ensign/Legends|ensign]] and a [[Tractor beam/Legends|tractor beam]] officer on the [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Chimaera/Legends|''Chimaera'']] during the [[Thrawn campaign]]. The tall man was responsible for the training and supervision of the tractor beams' crew, and was stationed on the bridge of the warship. [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] made an example of him, teaching him to correct his errors so they would not become mistakes, such as the insufficient training, disrespect for authority and inability to adapt demonstrated by one of Colclazure's crew, [[Cris Pieterson]], after a failed attempt to capture [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] in his [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-Wing]] with the Chimaera's tractor beams. Although Colclazure was verbally reprimanded, he escaped Pieterson's fate of execution at the hands of [[Rukh/Legends|Rukh]]. ==Behind the scenes== Colclazure was the result of a fan winning a charity auction to get his name in the book, and also won the right to decide if the character based on Pieterson (his fellow winner) lived or died.{{WebCite|url=http://www.totse.com/en/ego/science_fiction/tzi.html|text=An interview with Timothy Zahn, author of Heir to the Empire|archivedate=20080216125728}} ==Appearances== *''[[Heir to the Empire]]'' {{Ab|Heir to the Empire (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}} *[[Heir to the Empire 3|''Heir to the Empire'' 3]] {{1stp}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Colclazure }} [[Category:Combat instructors and training officers]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Imperial Navy officers of the Galactic Empire]] [[Category:Males]]
